channel.title: The Cambridge Record — war peace
channel.description: Everything on the record about war peace.

item.title: COM 881 #2025 — Communications were received from Nonie Valentine, regarding Our squares and corridors and Solidarity Ukraine flag in fr

item.description: Resolution In Support of Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley's Call for a Ceasefire

item.title: POR 2022 #36 — That the City Manager be and is hereby requested to light City Hall blue and yellow this week in honor of Ukraine
item.description: That the City Manager be and is hereby requested to light City Hall blue and yellow this week in honor of Ukraine

item.title: COM 300 #2021 — Sundry communications were received, regarding Policy Order #109 Solidarity with Palestine
item.description: Sundry communications were received, regarding Policy Order #109 Solidarity with Palestine

item.title: POR 2020 #24 — Thanking Charlotte Moore and Eileen Caves for their Art Exhibition titled “The Olive Trees are Weeping: Visions of Occup
item.description: Thanking Charlotte Moore and Eileen Caves for their Art Exhibition titled “The Olive Trees are Weeping: Visions of Occupied Palestine through Fiber Art and Photographs” and City Council solidarity with the people of Palestine
